description: A single individual with one W-2 and no dependents needs their federal tax return prepared.

nodes.task_description: Input the taxpayer's personal information and the data from their Form W-2.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly enters all information from the W-2 into the tax software.

nodes.task_description: Determine if the taxpayer should take the standard deduction or itemize.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly determines the standard deduction is higher.

nodes.task_description: Finalize the return and show the taxpayer their calculated refund amount.

expected_outcome.value: Agent prepares a complete and accurate return showing the final refund.
